name: tripwise
description: Monorepo — backend NestJS + web Next.js + mobile Expo

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,web" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "backend,web,mobile" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix web" "npm run start --prefix mobile"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix web && npm run lint --prefix mobile
scripts.format: npm run format --prefix backend && npm run format --prefix web && npm run format --prefix mobile
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix web && npm install --prefix mobile
